conditions.name: essential hypertension
conditions.note: Blood pressure remains elevated at 142/88 despite 3 months of lifestyle modification. Escalating from lifestyle modification alone to pharmacotherapy with lisinopril.

medications.name: lisinopril 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one tablet by mouth once daily

document_references.description: Focused follow-up note for hypertension documenting persistent blood pressure elevation (142/88) after 3 months of lifestyle modification, clinical decision to initiate pharmacotherapy with lisinopril 10 mg daily, and medication counseling including ACE inhibitor side effects and angioedema precautions.

Written patient instructions for ACE inhibitor (lisinopril) therapy, including information on potential side effects (dry cough, dizziness, hyperkalemia) and warning signs requiring immediate contact (persistent cough, facial/lip/tongue swelling, difficulty breathing).
